name: github
description: Interact with GitHub using the GitHub CLI (gh). Manage repos, issues, pull requests, releases, and more. Requires gh to be installed and authenticated on the gateway host.
commands: pr view <number> --repo <owner/repo>      — View a pull request
pr create --repo <owner/repo> --title <title> --body <body>     — Create a pull request
api <endpoint>                            — Make a raw GitHub API request

allowedCommands.description: Whitelist of top-level gh subcommands (e.g. 'repo', 'issue', 'pr'). Defaults to all when absent.

deniedCommands.description: Blacklist of top-level gh subcommands. Takes precedence over allowedCommands.
